title: 6 Errors Game
description: Test your vocabulary and deduction skills in 6-Errors, a word-guessing game! You have 6 chances to guess a hidden word by suggesting letters. Each correct letter will be revealed, bringing you closer to the solution. However, be careful! Every wrong guess brings you one step closer to losing. Can you crack the code before you run out of tries?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
